items.name: finish-branch
items.title: Finish Branch
items.description: Wrap up a completed development branch by verifying tests pass, detecting the workspace state, then presenting clear merge / PR / keep / discard options and executing the chosen one safely — including correct worktree and branch cleanup. Use when implementation is done, tests should be green, and you need to integrate or put away the work.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
